vocab.meaning: mầm mống của một ý tưởng/sự khởi đầu của một suy nghĩ
vocab.example: Growing that first sapling planted a seed of an idea in my mind about becoming an environmentalist.

vocab.meaning: không hề dễ dàng, đầy khó khăn
vocab.example: Caring for delicate orchids was not a bed of roses; they required constant attention and specific humidity.
When the pests attacked my vegetable patch, I had to overhaul my gardening methods root and branch.

vocab.meaning: dần dần khiến mình thích (thứ mà ban đầu không ấn tượng)
vocab.example: I wasn't fond of the smell of marigolds at first, but the hobby of gardening really grows on you over time.

vocab.word: can't see the forest for the trees
vocab.ipa: /kɑːnt siː ðə ˈfɒr.ɪst fɔːr ðə triːz/
vocab.meaning: quá chú ý vào chi tiết mà quên mất bức tranh tổng thể
vocab.example: I was so obsessed with one wilting leaf that I couldn't see the forest for the trees and missed the overall health of the garden.

vocab.meaning: mọi thứ đang diễn ra cực kỳ thuận lợi và thành công
vocab.example: Once I figured out the right fertilizer, everything was coming up roses and my balcony was full of blooms.

vocab.word: lead someone down the garden path
vocab.meaning: lừa dối hoặc đánh lạc hướng ai đó
vocab.example: The shopkeeper led me down the garden path by promising these seeds would grow in the shade, which was not true.

vocab.meaning: không còn trẻ trung nữa (dùng để so sánh với thời thơ ấu)
vocab.example: I'm no spring chicken now, but I still remember the excitement of seeing my first bean sprout break the soil.

vocab.meaning: ngôn ngữ hoa mỹ, bóng bẩy
vocab.example: My childhood diary was full of flowery language describing the simple daisies I grew in a pot.
Getting to the root of the matter, the main reason I grew plants was to spend more time outdoors with my grandfather.
